_comment: Bioma 'dance story' voiceless UGC dance-story — THE WORKED EXAMPLE. Copy to config.json and edit. An 18s 9:16 fast-cut ad where MUSIC + MOVEMENT + burned TEXT OVERLAYS are the whole ad (NO voiceover, NO auto-captions) and ONE recurring generated creator dances through a gut-health de-shame arc ('I blamed myself -> it was my gut -> I feel like me'). Pipeline: (1) lock an 18s ElevenLabs music_v1 track + librosa beat-grid.json (the DOWNBEATS set the segment durations); (2) lock the creator (gpt-image-2 anchor, 1024x1536, 4 candidates, wardrobe hard-lock); (3) 8 per-shot stills via nano-banana-pro/edit chained to the anchor as PRIMARY ref (bottle 2nd ref on s04/s08); (4) 8 Seedance 2.0 i2v dance clips (~4s, 720p, generate_audio false); (5) 7 Playwright text overlays (bold white, upper-third, hard-pop on the beat, green progress bar + 'Results vary.' disclaimer) + 5-stage ffmpeg compose + cream Bioma end card. Master 1080x1920 h264+aac, 18.0s (8 dance shots 15.5s + 2.5s end card). See scripts/PIPELINE.md for the source scripts (clients/bioma/ad-runs/run-01-dance-story/working/).
title: It's not you. It's your bacteria.

character._comment: ONE recurring live-action-style creator, generated + locked once (LOCKED.json). anchor = 1 of 4 gpt-image-2 candidates (1024x1536, quality high). descriptor + wardrobe_lock thread VERBATIM into every still; the anchor PNG is the FIRST (PRIMARY) media ref on all 8 stills. chain_strategy = anchor-ONLY: a second product ref (s04/s08) must NOT override identity. wardrobe HARD-LOCK held across all 8. Drift here < 5% (method anchor-ref); drift > 15% would escalate to face-swap-then-Soul-ID.
character.name: bioma_creator_1
character.descriptor: Relatable Latina woman around 38, dark wavy shoulder-length hair, warm natural makeup, soft dusty-pink athleisure (matching crop top + high-waist leggings), standing by a window against a warm neutral wall in a sunlit modern home. Realistic candid iPhone look, real-person texture — not a model/studio portrait.
character.wardrobe_lock: soft dusty-pink athleisure: matching crop top + high-waist leggings; barefoot or clean white sneakers; no jacket, no change of outfit across shots

world_lock.set: sunlit modern home, warm neutral wall by a large window, light wood floor, minimal warm decor
world_lock.lighting: soft natural window light, warm, bright

character.identity_lock_string: CRITICAL — she is the SAME woman as the FIRST reference image: keep her face, dark wavy shoulder-length hair, skin tone and her soft dusty-pink athleisure set (matching top and high-waist leggings) IDENTICAL across the shot. Bright sunlit modern home, warm neutral wall by a window, light wood floor. Photorealistic candid iPhone look, real natural skin texture, correct hand anatomy with five fingers, NOT a studio portrait, NOT AI-plastic. Vertical 9:16. No on-screen text, no logos, no watermark.
character._note_identity_lock: Appended verbatim after every still_prompt (gen_shot_stills.py IDENTITY). The 'correct hand anatomy with five fingers' clause pre-empts the Seedance hand distortion downstream.

music._comment: Locked FIRST — the delivered track + its librosa BEAT GRID set the timeline. source = generate: ElevenLabs music_v1 from `prompt`, 18s, force_instrumental FALSE (but vocals are SPARSE female hooks only — the overlays carry the message). VOICELESS: this track is the ENTIRE audio bed, NO separate VO, NO auto-captions. Soft intro 0-2s stays minimal so the visual doesn't fight the anticipation; the DROP at ~2.0-2.2s syncs to the Turn beat. No artist names in `prompt` (ElevenLabs ToS filter). See working/request.json (real payload) + working/music-prompt.md (brief).
music._note_bpm: Brief targeted ~124 BPM; the delivered track landed at 123.0469 BPM (beat_interval 0.487619s) — on target. The BEAT GRID, not the plan, sets the cuts.
music.prompt: Upbeat feel-good empowering dance-pop for an 18-second vertical social ad about a woman's joyful transformation. Bright and danceable with warm female vocals, around 124 BPM, four-on-the-floor groove, punchy claps and finger-snaps, plucky bright synths, warm sub-bass, uplifting major key. Confident, celebratory, sunny TikTok glow-up energy. Structure: 0:00-0:02 soft intimate held-back intro (filtered keys and a single soft pulse, anticipation); at 0:02 a DROP where the full beat kicks in with claps, bass and a bright vocal hook on the downbeat; 0:02-0:15 driving danceable full-energy groove with a catchy wordless ooh-oh vocal hook and a few light empowering ad-libs; 0:15-0:18 resolve into a warm satisfied final hook that settles gently for an end card, not an abrupt ending. Vocals: female, warm, joyful, sparse hooky phrases only (leave room for on-screen text). No rap, no melancholy, no aggressive EDM, no profanity. Clean and radio-ready.

structure.soft_intro: 0.0-2.0s soft, intimate, held-back intro (filtered keys + a single soft pulse, anticipation)
structure.drop: ~2.0s DROP: full beat kicks in, claps + bass + a bright vocal hook land hard on the downbeat (syncs to the Turn)
structure.groove: 2.0-15.0s driving danceable full-energy groove; wordless ooh-oh hook + a few light empowering ad-libs; sparse female vocals
structure.resolve: 15.0-18.0s resolve into a warm satisfied final hook that settles gently under the end card (no abrupt cut)

music.vocal_presence: female, warm, joyful, sparse hooky phrases / vowel hooks ONLY

beat_grid._comment: THE BEAT GRID IS GOSPEL. librosa beat_track + onset_detect on the DELIVERED music.mp3; segment durations are SNAPPED to the downbeats, NOT the beat-sheet. If the music changes, re-extract. Extracted values below are the real worked-example grid.
beat_grid._note: Downbeats drive the cut points (shots 4-9 land on consecutive downbeats) and the overlay pop-times.

look_pack._comment: ONE look pack drives all 8 stills so the arc reads as one continuous home video. aesthetic = the candid-iPhone-vs-polished call (here candid iPhone, handheld micro-jitter intentional). style_descriptor + the character wardrobe/world lock thread verbatim into every still. negative_tail is load-bearing on the i2v step — Seedance distorts hands + garbles the label.
look_pack.name: UGC_SUNLIT_HOME
look_pack.aesthetic: candid iPhone home-video (handheld micro-jitter INTENTIONAL — reads as a real creator, not a gimbal); bright sunlit modern home; NOT a studio portrait, NOT AI-plastic
palette_anchors: Bioma teal #1d3d39 (bottle label + optional overlay accent)
look_pack.style_descriptor: Photorealistic candid iPhone home video, bright sunlit modern home, warm neutral wall by a window, light wood floor, warm airy slightly cream-lifted grade, real natural skin texture, vertical 9:16. NOT a studio portrait, NOT AI-plastic.
look_pack.negative_tail: NEGATIVE: distorted or extra fingers, morphing face, warping or garbled bottle label, text artifacts, slow-motion freeze. Correct hand anatomy with five fingers. No on-screen text, no logos, no watermark in the plate (overlays are burned in post).

product._comment: The hero product PNG, passed as a SECOND image_url on the two product shots (s04, s08). The anchor stays the PRIMARY ref so identity holds. The bottle-lock string (below) is appended so nano-banana-pro reproduces the real label instead of hallucinating one.
product.bottle_lock_string: She holds the product from the SECOND reference image: a dark amber glass bottle with a black cap and a deep teal-green (#1d3d39) label reading 'BIOMA' with a white starburst symbol and the word 'PROBIOTICS' — reproduce that label exactly, do not garble the text.

keyframe_engine._comment: Anchor = gpt-image-2 (create-image-gpt-image-fal), 1024x1536 9:16, quality high, 4 candidates. Per-shot stills = nano-banana-pro/edit (create-image-fal). nano-banana-pro is the PERMISSIVE PRIMARY — plain gpt-image-2/edit false-flags benign athleisure/dance prompts via its content checker; nano-banana/edit is the fallback. Thread the anchor as PRIMARY on all 8; add the bottle as a SECOND ref only on s04/s08.
keyframe_engine.character_ref: anchor PNG = FIRST (primary) image_url on every still; product bottle = SECOND image_url on s04/s08 only

clip_engine._comment: 8 dance i2v clips off the clean stills: Seedance 2.0 image-to-video, ~4s each, 720p, 9:16, generate_audio FALSE (the ad uses our own ElevenLabs track). Lead the prompt with the CHARACTER VERB. Seedance distorts HANDS + garbles the product LABEL — the hand/label negative is critical on s04/s08. NO slow-mo freeze — 'holds/stands/minimal motion', never 'freezes/pauses'. Handheld micro-jitter intentional.
clip_engine.motion_opener: SUBJECT + ACTION VERB LEAD (Seedance prompt rule): the woman does a specific dance action, THEN keep moves simple + handheld. Realistic home video, natural motion.
clip_engine.negative_tail: Keep her face, hair and dusty-pink outfit consistent; realistic natural motion. NEGATIVE: distorted or extra fingers, morphing face, warping or garbled bottle label, text artifacts, slow-motion freeze.

overlays._comment: The 7 text-overlay PNGs ARE the ad copy — voiceless, NO VO, NO auto-captions. Playwright + Chromium from HTML: bold white (font-weight 800), ~104px (84px on the two long mechanism/proof lines), soft dark text-shadow stack, upper-third (padding 300px 110px 0), 88% safe area, one line per beat, HARD pop on the beat. A brand-accent GREEN progress bar (#00a66f, 78%) fills on the proof overlay (t5/s06); the 'Results vary.' disclaimer sits on the CTA overlay (t7, always-on compliance). accent_color (.b) is the emphasis-word color, legible over the plate.
overlays._note_font: Beat-sheet/storyboard spec Lexend; the REAL render used Plus Jakarta Sans (webfont). Either bold geometric sans works — load-bearing is weight 800 + the soft dark shadow + upper-third placement.

tableaux.still_prompt: Hook frame: she stands by the window facing the camera, arms relaxed at her sides, a soft neutral, slightly tired expression. Full-body wide shot.
tableaux.motion_hint: The woman stands and lets out a small breath, her shoulders dropping slightly; very subtle minimal motion. Mostly still, gentle handheld framing. Realistic home video.

tableaux.overlay_text: Turns out it was my gut.
tableaux.still_prompt: Turn frame: she stands facing camera, posture softening, the very start of a warm smile, hands beginning to lift as if about to move. Medium-full shot.
tableaux.motion_hint: The woman starts to sway and lifts her hands as a smile grows; gentle bounce to a beat. Subtle handheld. Realistic home video.

tableaux.still_prompt: Proof frame: a relaxed casual dance step-touch, weight shifting onto one foot, smiling, arms loosely out to the sides. Full-body.
tableaux.motion_hint: The woman does a happy step-touch dance, swaying side to side with loose arms, smiling. Light handheld bounce. Realistic home video.

tableaux.still_prompt: Proof insert: she holds the bottle up toward the camera with a playful smile, her other hand on her hip. Waist-up framing.
tableaux.motion_hint: The woman holds the bottle up and gives it a small playful shake toward the camera, smiling. Slight push-in. Keep the bottle label readable. Realistic home video.

tableaux.still_prompt: Proof frame: caught mid twirl/spin, hair and body in motion, joyful expression, slight three-quarter side angle. Full-body.
tableaux.motion_hint: The woman twirls and spins once, her hair swinging, laughing joyfully. The camera follows slightly. Realistic home video.

tableaux.still_prompt: Proof frame: dancing with arms swinging happily, big smile, facing the camera. Medium-full shot.
tableaux.motion_hint: The woman dances with her arms swinging happily, bouncing to a beat, facing the camera. Handheld. Realistic home video.
tableaux._note: The t5-bloat progress-bar overlay window spans s05->s06; the t6-payoff line lands on this shot.

tableaux.overlay_text: It's not you. It's your bacteria.
tableaux.still_prompt: Payoff frame: both arms raised up in a celebratory cheer, huge genuine smile, chin slightly up. Full-body hero shot.
tableaux.motion_hint: The woman throws both arms up in celebration with a joyful little hop, beaming. Energetic, upbeat. Handheld. Realistic home video.

tableaux.overlay_text: It's not you. It's your bacteria.
tableaux.still_prompt: CTA frame: she holds the bottle up near her face toward the camera, beaming with joy. Close, waist-up framing.
tableaux.motion_hint: The woman holds the bottle near her face and smiles warmly at the camera with a gentle happy nod. Minimal motion, keep the bottle label readable. Slight push-in. Realistic home video.
tableaux._note: Held still (src_in 0.0) so the bottle label stays clean; last body shot before the end card. The t7-cta overlay window spans s07->s08.

tableaux.still_prompt: END CARD — assets/end-cards/end-card-01-cream.png (cream Bioma card + wordmark + bioma.health handle). Static hold, built by the render cap (not i2v). Holds 2.5s with the music settling under it.

end_card._comment: The brand end-card PNG, held 2.5s as a segment inside the concat (before the -t 18 cap), with the music settling + fading under it. Not AI-rendered.

audio_mix._comment: The music is the FULL audio bed — no VO to duck under, no auto-captions. Trim to 18s, afade=t=out:st=17.2:d=0.8 (0.8s fade so the end card breathes, no abrupt cut), aresample=44100, cap the master at -t 18.
audio_mix.loudness_note: the source run did not run a separate loudnorm pass; the delivered music_v1 track was already broadcast-level

music.note: the generated ElevenLabs track IS the full bed (no VO, no ducking)

overlays.note: the 7 Playwright text PNGs ARE the ad copy — voiceless, hard pop on the beat, upper-third, 88% safe area

captions.note: NO YouTube/auto captions — they collide with the overlays (overlays ARE the copy)

progress_bar.note: green progress bar (#00a66f, 78%) fills on the proof overlay (s06)

disclaimer.note: 'Results vary.' on the CTA overlay — always-on compliance

end_card.note: cream Bioma end-card PNG holds 2.5s with the music settling under it
